meta.title: SQL-first (query_rewind + get_schema) vs specialized-tools MCP eval
meta.instance_note: This instance has populated LISTENING, RUNNING, WATCHING, PLACES domains. READING, COLLECTING (discogs/trakt), and ATTENDING tables are EMPTY (0 rows). Cross-domain questions therefore join among the four populated domains. Cross-domain questions targeting empty domains would be unanswerable by BOTH architectures and are excluded as uninformative; the empty-domain fact is itself reported in REPORT.md.
meta.ground_truth_method: Every ground_truth was derived independently via hand-written, human-reviewed reference SQL run once against POST /v1/query and frozen here. For tiers 1-3 the reference value was additionally cross-checked against the OLD specialized endpoint; disagreements are recorded in the question's `notes` and are themselves findings. The `sql` field (NEW path) and reference SQL are the same family but the ground_truth VALUE is the frozen constant, so NEW is not graded against its own live output tautologically — it is graded against the frozen constant.

grading.scalar: extracted value == expected (numbers compared with abs tolerance `tol`, default 0)
grading.top_item: first row's label == expected_label AND its count == expected_count (ordering of ties tolerated only where noted)

questions.question: How many distinct movies have I watched?
questions.notes: OLD /watching/stats reports total_movies=1947, which is the count of watch EVENTS (watch_history rows), not distinct movies (1856). Recorded as an OLD correctness gap for the distinct-movie interpretation.
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM movies

questions.question: How many movie viewings (including rewatches) are in my history?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM watch_history

questions.question: What is my total scrobble count?
questions.sql: SELECT total_scrobbles AS n FROM lastfm_user_stats

questions.question: Who is my most-played artist of all time?
questions.sql: SELECT name AS label, playcount AS cnt FROM lastfm_artists WHERE is_filtered=0 ORDER BY playcount DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many check-ins do I have?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM checkins

questions.question: How many unique venues have I checked into?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT venue_id) AS n FROM checkins

questions.question: How many runs have I logged?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun')

questions.question: How many total activities (all sports) do I have?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0

questions.question: How many TV shows have I watched?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM shows

questions.question: How many unique artists have I scrobbled?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM lastfm_artists

questions.question: What is my most-played album of all time?
questions.sql: SELECT name AS label, playcount AS cnt FROM lastfm_albums WHERE is_filtered=0 ORDER BY playcount DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What are the top 5 cities I have checked into?
questions.notes: No OLD endpoint returns a city ranking for check-ins; /places/stats only exposes top_categories. Unanswerable by specialized tools.

old_path.reason: places endpoints expose top venue CATEGORIES, not a city leaderboard; no /places/cities exists

questions.sql: SELECT venue_city AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM checkins GROUP BY venue_city ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: How many distinct movies did I rate 5 stars (10/10)?
questions.notes: The /watching/ratings endpoint has NO rating filter param (min_rating is ignored — it returns all 1928 rated entries regardless). Counting exactly-10 movies would require paginating all 1928 rows and filtering client-side, not a single-endpoint extraction. Marked old_path unanswerable as a single specialized-tool call.

old_path.reason: /watching/ratings has no rating-value filter; returns all rated entries. No endpoint yields a count of exactly-5-star (10/10) movies directly.

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS n FROM watch_history WHERE user_rating=10

questions.question: What was my total running distance (runs only) in 2021, in miles?
questions.notes: OLD /running/stats/years/2021 reports total_distance_mi=367.96, which sums ALL activity types (rides, walks), not runs only. The run-only figure is 111.62. OLD cannot isolate runs -> recorded as OLD correctness gap for the runs-only interpretation.
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(distance_miles),2) AS n FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun') AND substr(start_date_local,1,4)='2021'

questions.question: What is my most-watched movie genre (by watch events)?
questions.notes: OLD /watching/stats/genres reports Drama with count 605 (distinct movies carrying the genre). Reference SQL by watch-EVENT is 651. Labels agree (Drama) but counts differ by interpretation. OLD is correct on the top LABEL; count differs.
questions.sql: SELECT g.name AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM watch_history wh JOIN movie_genres mg ON mg.movie_id=wh.movie_id JOIN genres g ON g.id=mg.genre_id GROUP BY g.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Which director have I watched the most distinct films from?
questions.sql: SELECT d.name AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT wh.movie_id) AS cnt FROM watch_history wh JOIN movie_directors md ON md.movie_id=wh.movie_id JOIN directors d ON d.id=md.director_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many times have I checked into a Coffee Shop?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM checkins WHERE venue_category='Coffee Shop'

questions.question: How many distinct movies from the 2010s have I watched?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wh.movie_id) AS n FROM watch_history wh JOIN movies m ON m.id=wh.movie_id WHERE m.year>=2010 AND m.year<=2019

questions.question: How many (unfiltered) scrobbles did I have in 2024?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,4)='2024'

questions.question: How many distinct countries have I checked into?

old_path.reason: no places endpoint returns a distinct-country count; /places/stats exposes only categories and totals

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT venue_country) AS n FROM checkins WHERE venue_country IS NOT NULL

questions.question: In how many distinct cities have I run?

old_path.reason: /running/cities lists cities with pagination but returns rows, not a distinct-count scalar. Approximable by reading pagination.total but that is not exposed as a distinct-city scalar in the recent/list responses; no direct count endpoint.

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) AS n FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND city IS NOT NULL

questions.question: What was my longest run (miles) in each year?
questions.notes: OLD /running/stats/years returns per-year longest_run_mi, but that field is computed over ALL activities, not runs only; values can differ from the run-only reference. Grading NEW on run-only; OLD checked for the two spot-check years.
questions.sql: SELECT substr(start_date_local,1,4) AS y, ROUND(MAX(distance_miles),2) AS mx FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun') GROUP BY y ORDER BY y

questions.question: What were my monthly scrobble counts for 2024?

old_path.extract: data[].value keyed by period; spot_check months 2024-03, 2024-12

questions.sql: SELECT substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,7) AS ym, COUNT(*) AS c FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,4)='2024' GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym

questions.question: What was the top genre of movies I watched in 2023?

old_path.reason: /watching/stats/genres has no year filter; it is all-time only. Cannot restrict genre breakdown to 2023.

questions.sql: SELECT g.name AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM watch_history wh JOIN movie_genres mg ON mg.movie_id=wh.movie_id JOIN genres g ON g.id=mg.genre_id WHERE substr(wh.watched_at,1,4)='2023' GROUP BY g.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Which year did I check in the most, and how many times?

old_path.reason: no places endpoint yields per-year check-in counts; /places/trends returns a preset window, not a full per-year leaderboard

questions.sql: SELECT substr(checked_in_at,1,4) AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM checkins GROUP BY label ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the single movie I have watched the most times, and how many times?

old_path.reason: no endpoint returns a per-movie rewatch-count leaderboard; /watching/movies lists films but not a max-rewatch ranking

questions.sql: SELECT m.title AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM watch_history wh JOIN movies m ON m.id=wh.movie_id GROUP BY wh.movie_id ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Who was my top artist in 2024 by scrobbles?
questions.sql: SELECT ar.name AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id JOIN lastfm_artists ar ON ar.id=t.artist_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,4)='2024' GROUP BY ar.id ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: In which year did I watch the most movies, and how many?

old_path.reason: no endpoint returns a per-year watch-count leaderboard across all years; /watching/year/{year} is single-year and requires knowing the year first

questions.sql: SELECT substr(watched_at,1,4) AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM watch_history GROUP BY label ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What was my total run distance per year (runs only)?
questions.notes: OLD /running/stats/years returns total_distance_mi per year but over ALL activity types, not runs only; expected to diverge.
questions.sql: SELECT substr(start_date_local,1,4) AS y, ROUND(SUM(distance_miles),2) AS d FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun') GROUP BY y ORDER BY y

questions.question: On how many distinct days did I both watch a movie AND check in somewhere?

old_path.reason: requires intersecting watch_history.watched_at (watching domain) with checkins.checked_in_at (places domain) by calendar day; no endpoint crosses the watching and places domains

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT date(wh.watched_at)) AS n FROM watch_history wh WHERE date(wh.watched_at) IN (SELECT date(checked_in_at) FROM checkins)

questions.question: On how many distinct days did I check into a movie theater AND log a movie the same day (cinema trips)?

old_path.reason: requires joining checkins.venue_category='Movie Theater' (places) to watch_history by date (watching); no cross-domain endpoint

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT date(c.checked_in_at)) AS n FROM checkins c WHERE c.venue_category='Movie Theater' AND date(c.checked_in_at) IN (SELECT date(watched_at) FROM watch_history)

questions.question: In 2024, did I average more scrobbles on days I ran versus days I did not run?

old_path.reason: requires partitioning listening scrobbles by whether a strava run occurred that day; joins listening and running domains on date with conditional aggregation. No endpoint does this.

questions.sql: WITH days AS (SELECT DISTINCT substr(start_date_local,1,10) d FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun') AND substr(start_date_local,1,4)='2024'), sc AS (SELECT substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,10) d, COUNT(*) c FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,4)='2024' GROUP BY d) SELECT ROUND((SELECT AVG(c) FROM sc WHERE d IN (SELECT d FROM days)),1) AS run_day_avg, ROUND((SELECT AVG(c) FROM sc WHERE d NOT IN (SELECT d FROM days)),1) AS non_run_avg

questions.question: How many scrobbles happened on days I went for a run (all time)?

old_path.reason: requires membership test of scrobble date against the set of run dates; crosses listening and running domains, no endpoint

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,10) IN (SELECT substr(start_date_local,1,10) FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun'))

questions.question: In how many distinct cities have I BOTH run and checked in (exact city-name match)?

old_path.reason: requires intersecting strava_activities.city (running) with checkins.venue_city (places); no endpoint returns either full city set for intersection, and none crosses domains

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sa.city) AS n FROM strava_activities sa WHERE sa.is_deleted=0 AND sa.city IS NOT NULL AND sa.city IN (SELECT DISTINCT venue_city FROM checkins)

questions.question: On how many distinct days did I do all three: scrobble music, go for a run, and check in somewhere?

old_path.reason: three-way date intersection across listening, running, and places domains; no endpoint combines even two of them

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT DISTINCT substr(start_date_local,1,10) d FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun')) r WHERE r.d IN (SELECT substr(checked_in_at,1,10) FROM checkins) AND r.d IN (SELECT substr(scrobbled_at,1,10) FROM lastfm_scrobbles)

questions.question: How many movie viewings happened on days I also ran?

old_path.reason: requires date-membership of watch_history (watching) against run dates (running); no cross-domain endpoint

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM watch_history wh WHERE substr(wh.watched_at,1,10) IN (SELECT substr(start_date_local,1,10) FROM strava_activities WHERE is_deleted=0 AND sport_type IN ('Run','TrailRun'))

questions.question: How many total scrobbles happened on days I watched a movie?

old_path.reason: requires listening scrobbles filtered to watch-history dates; crosses listening and watching domains

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM lastfm_scrobbles s JOIN lastfm_tracks t ON t.id=s.track_id WHERE t.is_filtered=0 AND substr(s.scrobbled_at,1,10) IN (SELECT substr(watched_at,1,10) FROM watch_history)

questions.question: On days I watched a movie, which single day had the most check-ins, and how many?

old_path.reason: requires grouping checkins (places) restricted to watch-history dates (watching) and ranking; two-domain join plus aggregation, no endpoint

questions.sql: SELECT substr(c.checked_in_at,1,10) AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM checkins c WHERE substr(c.checked_in_at,1,10) IN (SELECT substr(watched_at,1,10) FROM watch_history) GROUP BY label ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: In 2018, on how many distinct days did I both check in AND scrobble?

old_path.reason: date intersection of checkins (places) and scrobbles (listening) restricted to 2018; crosses two domains, no endpoint

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT substr(c.checked_in_at,1,10)) AS n FROM checkins c WHERE substr(c.checked_in_at,1,4)='2018' AND substr(c.checked_in_at,1,10) IN (SELECT substr(scrobbled_at,1,10) FROM lastfm_scrobbles)

questions.question: Among cities where I have also checked in, which has my single farthest run, and how far?
questions.notes: Data-quality caveat: the 121.25mi San Francisco value is almost certainly a mis-recorded activity, but it is the deterministic answer to the query as written; the question tests cross-domain join mechanics, not data hygiene.

old_path.reason: requires filtering strava_activities.city (running) to the set of checkin cities (places), then max distance; crosses two domains

questions.sql: SELECT sa.city AS label, ROUND(MAX(sa.distance_miles),2) AS cnt FROM strava_activities sa WHERE sa.is_deleted=0 AND sa.city IN (SELECT DISTINCT venue_city FROM checkins) GROUP BY sa.city ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many check-ins do I have in Union City, my most-run city?

old_path.reason: the city 'Union City' is derived from the running domain (top run city); counting check-ins there requires knowing that fact from running first, then querying places. No single tool bridges 'top run city' -> 'check-ins in that city'.

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM checkins WHERE venue_city='Union City'

questions.question: List the cities where I have both run and checked in (alphabetical), and confirm Bengaluru and Fremont are among them.

old_path.reason: intersection of running cities and places cities; no endpoint returns both sets nor their intersection

questions.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sa.city AS label FROM strava_activities sa WHERE sa.is_deleted=0 AND sa.city IS NOT NULL AND sa.city IN (SELECT DISTINCT venue_city FROM checkins) ORDER BY sa.city

questions.question: Across all my movie-theater check-ins, on how many distinct days did I check in at a theater at all?

old_path.reason: this is single-domain (places) but there is no endpoint returning distinct theater-check-in DAYS; /places/stats gives a theater count of check-ins (280), not distinct days (270). Included to contrast the day-granularity gap. Marked unanswerable as a distinct-day scalar.

questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT date(checked_in_at)) AS n FROM checkins WHERE venue_category='Movie Theater'
